articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Bluesky leans into AI with Attie, an app for building custom feeds - TechCrunch
articles.description: Bluesky’s new app Attie uses AI to help people build custom feeds the open social networking protocol atproto.
articles.content: The team from Bluesky has built another app — and this time, it’s not a social network, but an AI assistant that allows you to design your own algorithm, create custom feeds, and, one day, vibe-code … [+5782 chars]
